blurb: DSIT AI Opportunities Action Plan implementation. Launch coverage uses primary GOV.UK publications.

publications.title: AI Opportunities Action Plan: government response
publications.byline: Department for Science, Innovation and Technology; Matt Clifford CBE
publications.summary: DSIT’s government response accepts the 50 AI Opportunities Action Plan recommendations, including AI Growth Zones, compute expansion and a National Data Library.

publications.title: AI Opportunities Action Plan: One Year On
publications.byline: Department for Science, Innovation and Technology
publications.summary: DSIT’s one-year update reports delivery against the AI Opportunities Action Plan and announces a Future of Work Unit to build evidence on AI’s labour-market impacts.

notes: launch_harvest 2026-06-27: direct fetch HTTP 200 on GOV.UK government-response page; one-year-on page supplied by portal batch.
